metadata.description: Claude Code skills for building software for the Saudi market — PDPL & ZATCA compliance, Arabic RTL/i18n quality.

plugins.name: saudi-compliance-kit
plugins.description: Engineering-level compliance & localization review for Saudi-market apps: PDPL (SDAIA) data protection, ZATCA (Fatoorah) e-invoicing, and Arabic RTL/i18n correctness.
